content:
# Session 47 — review summary

## NO PROVER LANE — terminal closeout (11th consecutive, correct call)
- `attempts_raw.jsonl` line 1 = `{type: summary, no_prover_lane: true, iter: 47}`. `prover.jsonl` empty.
- `sync_leanok` iter=47 sha=`10f45e1` +0/−0, `chapters_touched: []`. Single extraction commit `c53d9c9`;
  `git diff --stat HEAD -- '*.lean'` empty ⇒ no `.lean` edit since iter-036, no regression possible.
- No closable in-cone sorry exists. Re-confirmed via `grep -rn sorry AlgebraicJacobian/`:
  `SectionGradedRing.lean:3880` is a COMMENT ("…no proof exists without `sorryAx`"), NOT a typed sorry —
  file SORRY-FREE; `QuotScheme.lean` holds the 4 typed χ skeletons (L126/165/201/228, all
  cohomology/Snapper-gated); `RelativeSpec.lean` holds typed sorries — both out-of-leg.

## Leg state — DELIVERED axiom-clean, await merge
`Grassmannian.represents` + `tautologicalQuotient_epi` + B1–B7 assoc + ∀L `GSemiring` + invertible-L
`GCommSemiring` + module `sectionGradedModule_gmodule`. `SectionGradedRing.lean` SORRY-FREE. No live frontier.

## Decision — no prover dispatch (mechanical hard gate)
Re-weighed and declined all options exactly as iters 037–046:
- re-probe χ — cohomology/Snapper-gated (no Mathlib scheme cohomology at pinned commit);
- open cohomology megaleg — overreach (critic-validated H⁰ scope, not USER-opened);
- split done file — busywork (split directive targets files with UNPROVED theorems; SGR is 0-sorry);
- name/repoint anonymous pins — net-negative (manufactures merge conflicts; leg diverges by design).

## Blueprint doctor — out-of-cone, do NOT edit
`logs/iter-047/blueprint-doctor.md`: dormant inherited chapters only — `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange`
(2 phantom covers for non-existent `FlatBaseChange{,Global}.lean` + 13 broken `\ref`),
`Picard_GlueDescent` (4 broken `\cref`/`\uses`), `Picard_QuotScheme` (13 broken `\cref`). No prover near
them ⇒ phantom covers misroute nothing. Merge-time per Archon memory.

## Verification (mine)
- No new decls; file unchanged since iter-036 (deliverables already axiom-clean in prior reviews).
  No regression possible — no edit.

## Subagent skips
- lean-auditor: no `.lean` file modified this iter (`git diff --stat HEAD -- '*.lean'` empty); prior
  verdict (iter-036) had no live must-fix. Both skip conditions met.
- lean-vs-blueprint-checker: no `.lean` files received prover work this iter (no edits to verify).
- progress-critic / strategy-critic / blueprint-reviewer: plan-phase subagents; route closed iter-036;
  STRATEGY.md unchanged, prior SOUND; HARD GATE moot (no dispatch).
